core_principles: Swiss Corporate Precision: Minimalist, authoritative, and data-driven.
No AI Slop: Zero purple/teal gradients. Zero generic Inter typography.
Bento Grid Density: Use rigid, structured layouts to convey trust and engineering quality.
High Contrast: Leverage stark white against deeply tinted cool greys and piercing signal accents.

layout.spacing: Generous Spacing (p-6, p-8, p-12) for containers. Keep elements breathing.
layout.grid_marketing: Bento Grid Mode A (Tetris) - grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-12 gap-8.
layout.grid_dashboard: Control Room Grid Mode B - grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-3 lg:grid-cols-4 gap-6. Dense but clear.

surfaces.headers: Crystal Glassmorphism: bg-white/70 backdrop-blur-xl border-b border-slate-200/50 shadow-sm
surfaces.cards: Grid Borders: border-collapse style or crisp 1px borders (border-slate-200) with flat white backgrounds. Hover: -translate-y-1 shadow-lg
surfaces.inputs: Neumorphism twist: Soft inner shadow with sharp 1px border. bg-slate-50 border-slate-200.

components_strategy.marketing: Pure HTML/Tailwind for overlapping layouts and bento grids. No Shadcn wrappers for raw layout.
components_strategy.interactive: Shadcn UI (heavily customized). Use Shadcn for Form, Input, Select, Dialog. Flatten the borders and ensure font matches.
components_strategy.buttons: Sharp edges (rounded-sm or rounded-none). No large pill shapes. High contrast hover states.

images.description: Abstract modern corporate background blue white
Modern business professional office - People in a modern office lobby
Woman using her phone at desk
Abstract blue and white flowing fabric texture

media.image_rules: Overlay hero images with max bg-white/40 (light theme) or use a gradient. Do not use blank transparent overlays.

instructions_to_main_agent.testing: All interactive elements MUST include a 'data-testid' attribute (e.g., data-testid='cv-submit-button').
instructions_to_main_agent.icons: Use Phosphor Icons (@phosphor-icons/react) for a high-end dense professional look.
instructions_to_main_agent.language: All app copy must be in French as specified in the problem statement.
instructions_to_main_agent.pricing_ui: Use 3-Column Cards pattern. Make middle tier 'Recommended' with bolder outline. Implement annual/monthly toggle showing dollar savings.
